name: nav-item
description: A single navigation link, used in the header nav and footer. Carries a current/active state that is exposed to assistive tech.

current.description: Marks the item for the current page.

emphasis.description: Footer links use the muted emphasis.

a11y.targetSize: Padding brings the target to the 24px minimum; header items meet 44px.
a11y.contrast: Link and hover colors meet 4.5:1 on the header/footer surface.
notes: Current state is conveyed with an underline/indicator in addition to color (not color alone).

elementor.notes: Compiles to items within the Elementor Pro Nav Menu / WordPress menu; current state maps to the menu's current-item class.

mapping.emphasis: Style → Typography color, bound to a Global Color
